iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 45% (stable). Day 24 Hour 12 UTC. CRITICAL (stable). 180 injured in towns near Dimona from Iranian missiles. IAEA re-engagement mentioned but no formal diplomatic channel. No new nuclear-specific events. Trump 5-day delay applies to power plants, not nuclear sites per se. Updated 2026-03-23T12:00:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 24 Hour 12 UTC. CRITICAL (down from imminent). MAJOR: Trump postpones power plant strikes for 5 days after 'productive conversations' with Tehran. Bloomberg: ceasefire talks underway. Iran claims Trump 'backed down.' Fighting continues — Israel strikes Lebanon/Tehran, IRGC waves ongoing. Hormuz still blocked. 5-day window is key. Updated 2026-03-23T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Starmer-Trump discuss need to open Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: UK PM Starmer and Trump discuss need to reopen Strait of Hormuz. UK-EU-Gulf joint statement on 'appropriate efforts' for safe passage.

latest_news.headline: Gulf states UAE/Bahrain join Hormuz coalition statement with EU
latest_news.text: UAE Foreign Minister: 'we will never be blackmailed by terrorists.' UAE and Bahrain sign joint statement with European leaders expressing readiness to contribute to Hormuz reopening efforts. Gulf aligning firmly with US.

latest_news.headline: Israel warns 'several more weeks' of fighting against Iran
latest_news.text: IDF says preparing for 'several more weeks of fighting against Iran and Hezbollah' — open-ended war commitment.

latest_news.headline: FTSE drops 2% to 9,706 — lowest since December
latest_news.text: FTSE 100 down over 2% to 9,706. European markets following Asian rout. DAX, CAC also down ~2%.

latest_news.headline: Oman FM: US has 'lost control of its foreign policy'
latest_news.text: Oman FM writes in Economist that US has 'lost control of its foreign policy' — urges all parties back to negotiating table. Oman lone regional mediator critical of US.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 78% (stable). Day 24 Hour 12 UTC. IMMINENT (stable). IDF expands ground+air. Hezbollah launches record 63 operations. Litani bridges destroyed. Civilian killed in Tyre airstrike. Israeli civilian killed by own artillery near Lebanon border. IRGC commanding Hezbollah confirmed by Lebanese PM. Open-ended campaign. Updated 2026-03-23T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: IDF approves expansion of ground+air attacks - 2nd division deployed
latest_news.text: IDF approves expansion of ground and air attacks against Hezbollah. Second division deployed to southern Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Lebanese PM: IRGC officers commanding Hezbollah operations
latest_news.text: Lebanese PM Salam says IRGC members are commanding Hezbollah operations in ongoing war against Israel.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge - key Litani River crossing
latest_news.text: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge, key Litani River crossing linking south Lebanon to rest of country.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 24 Hour 12 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey. NATO Patriot batteries active. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-23T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 40% (up). Day 24 Hour 12 UTC. CRITICAL (stable). Spring-summer 2026 offensive ongoing — 8,000+ Russian troops lost this week per Zelensky. 970 KIA yesterday. Ukrainian counterattacks in south making effects. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Oil boost helps Russia. Updated 2026-03-23T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: CNN confirms: Russian forces begin spring-summer 2026 offensive
latest_news.text: CNN: Russia begins anticipated spring-summer offensive against Ukrainian Fortress Belt. Syrskyi: 'stepped up pressure across several sections of the front.' Sloviansk/Kramatorsk directions.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 46% (up). Day 24 Hour 12 UTC. CRITICAL (stable). Eid ceasefire expires midnight Mar 24 (~12hrs). Multiple breaches (mortar fire Kunar). Pakistan FM vows 'eradicate terrorism' — no extension. Post-Eid full war near-certain. Updated 2026-03-23T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan FM vows to 'eradicate terrorism' as Afghan ceasefire nears end
latest_news.text: Pakistan FM says committed to 'eradicate the menace of terrorism' as Eid ceasefire expires midnight March 24. No extension signal. Post-ceasefire escalation near-certain.

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of mortar fire during Eid ceasefire - 1 killed. ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Fraying badly.

top_signals: MAJOR DE-ESCALATION: Trump postpones power plant strikes for 5 days after 'productive conversations' with Tehran
Bloomberg: Ceasefire talks underway between US and Iran
Iran claims Trump 'backed down' — spinning diplomatically
FIGHTING CONTINUES: Israeli strikes Lebanon/Tehran, IRGC waves ongoing
Hormuz still under IRGC blockade despite talks
ISRAEL-LEBANON: IDF ground+air expanded, Hezbollah record 63 operations, bridges destroyed
RUSSIA OFFENSIVE: 8,000+ Russian troops lost this week, spring-summer offensive ongoing
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: Ceasefire expires midnight Mar 24, FM vows 'eradicate terrorism'
ENERGY CRISIS: IEA worst since 1970s, Brent $112+, markets crashing
5-DAY WINDOW: Key test — will diplomacy hold or strikes resume March 28?

new: TRUMP-IRAN DIPLOMACY: 'Productive conversations' — first direct talks since war began
TRUMP POSTPONES STRIKES: 5-day delay on power plant strikes, subject to talks success
IRAN CLAIMS TRUMP 'BACKED DOWN' — diplomatic spin to claim leverage
ISRAEL-LEBANON: Hezbollah record 63 operations, ground campaign expanding
RUSSIA-UKRAINE: 8,000+ Russian losses this week per Zelensky — offensive grinding
zone_changes: iran_conventional: IMMINENT -> CRITICAL (downgrade — ultimatum replaced by 5-day talks window)
iran_conventional: iran_rejects_dialogue signal should be deprecated in favor of diplomacy_active
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: PARTIAL DE-ESCALATION: Trump delays power plant strikes 5 days for talks. First diplomatic channel with Tehran. However, fighting continues on all fronts. Hormuz still blocked. 5-day window is fragile.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens to mine ALL Persian Gulf communication lines if coast/islands attacked
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Iran National Defence Council
latest_news.text: Iran's National Defence Council says any attempt to attack the Iranian coast or islands will cause 'all communication lines in the Persian Gulf to be mined' — a significant escalation from Hormuz-only blockade to Gulf-wide mine threat.

latest_news.headline: IRGC escalates: will hit Israeli AND Gulf power plants if US strikes Iran's
latest_news.text: IRGC statement: will attack Israel's power plants and those supplying US bases in Gulf if Trump carries out threat to 'obliterate' Iran's power network. Major counter-escalation.

latest_news.headline: Iran military declares ready to close Strait of Hormuz 'indefinitely'
latest_news.text: Iran's military says ready to close Hormuz indefinitely if Trump bombs power plants. Upgrading from 'threatened' to 'ready and prepared.'

latest_news.headline: IEA chief: war energy crunch worse than 1973+1979 oil crises and Ukraine gas crisis COMBINED
latest_news.text: Fatih Birol: 'Two oil crises and one gas crash put all together.' IEA consulting Asia/Europe on additional stockpile releases.

latest_news.headline: UK Starmer chairs emergency Cobra on war economic fallout
latest_news.text: Starmer, Chancellor Reeves, BoE Governor Bailey attend. UK bonds steeper decline than peers. Heavy UK dependence on imported natural gas.

latest_news.headline: Asia markets crash continues - Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%, HK -3%
latest_news.text: Wave of selling across Asia-Pacific. US dollar rising as safe haven. Brent $112+. Won weakest since 2009.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 12:00 UTC). BREAKTHROUGH: Trump postpones Iran power plant strikes for 5 days after 'productive conversations' with Tehran. First diplomatic engagement since war began. Bloomberg: ceasefire talks underway. Iran spins as Trump 'backed down.' However, fighting continues — Israeli strikes on Lebanon/Tehran, IRGC waves, Hormuz still blocked. Russia spring offensive ongoing. Pakistan ceasefire expires midnight tomorrow. 5-day window ends March 28 — make-or-break for diplomacy.
de_escalation_watch: DE-ESCALATION: None. Iran escalated to Gulf-wide mining threat. Ultimatum expired with no off-ramp. IRGC permanent blockade language. Russia offensive ongoing. Pakistan ceasefire dead. Net trajectory: toward full Gulf mining + potential US power plant strikes.
